title: Operator TUI: Carbonyl OIDC browser session modes

progress_assessment.reason: OIDC core primitives exist, but browser-mode integration methods claimed in the commit were not found in the current BrowserModeController. Keep integration tasks open.

related_architecture_decisions.summary: OIDC session handling is shared by the Carbonyl browser surface and the new realtime WebRTC stack, but it must not depend on the legacy HTTP Hub relay transport. OIDC provides authenticated session identity and nonce material; WebRTC signaling/DataChannel remains in realtime/.

summary: Add two explicit OIDC-capable Carbonyl browser modes for the Operator TUI center viewport. Core PKCE/OIDC helper pieces are implemented, but the full TUI/browser integration is still in progress.
important_design_decision: Carbonyl is allowed to render and hold browser cookies for the active browser profile, but OAuth tokens must be owned by Ananta AuthController by default. A provider-full-browser-session mode may exist, but it must be explicitly enabled and isolated per session/profile. For Option C, this OIDC layer provides identity/session nonce data to realtime WebRTC without coupling to the legacy Hub relay transport.

task_state_contract.rule: Every implementation task has its own status. When a task is implemented and verified, change that task status to done and add done_at plus evidence. Do not mark the whole TODO done until all implementation_tasks are done.

keycloak.reason: Ananta controls keycloak.ananta.de and can configure redirect URIs, client type, PKCE and test realms.

google.reason: Google OAuth flows may reject non-standard or embedded user agents. Carbonyl should be tested, not assumed.

evidence: client_surfaces/operator_tui/auth/oidc_auth_controller.py exists and implements PKCE, state, nonce, authorization request and callback completion.

OidcAuthController returns raw tokens in OidcAuthResult on success; this is okay for AuthController ownership, but derived session nonce/subject-hash handoff to realtime WebRTC is not clearly implemented here.
remaining_work: Add or verify explicit helper for derived subject hash and realtime session nonce without exposing raw tokens.
Record tests that prove token redaction and wrong-state rejection.
implementation_tasks.title: Add AuthController contract for Carbonyl-initiated OIDC login

evidence: Commit 6bf42bfe277cf6ca71fdcce2a89896849a36106a claims auth/loopback_callback_server.py with 127.0.0.1 random-port callback listener and tests.
implementation_tasks.title: Implement local loopback callback listener

evidence: CarbonylProfileManager creates unique directories under profile_root and deletes ephemeral profiles on cleanup.
implementation_tasks.title: Add isolated Carbonyl browser profiles

implementation_tasks.blocker: The commit message claimed BrowserModeController methods such as open_oidc_provider_session, but the current BrowserModeController only exposes generic browser-mode lifecycle methods. OIDC-specific browser session wiring was not found.
evidence: client_surfaces/operator_tui/visual/browser/browser_mode_controller.py currently has enter_browser_mode(), exit_browser_mode(), tick(), handle_input(), resize().
No open_oidc_provider_session/start_oidc_login/complete_oidc_login methods found by repository search.
remaining_work: Add OIDC-specific browser session command/controller methods or create a dedicated OidcBrowserSessionController.
Wire isolated Carbonyl profiles into CarbonylRunner launch arguments.
Verify Keycloak login page opens in Carbonyl session mode.
implementation_tasks.title: Wire Carbonyl real browser session mode

evidence: Loopback callback listener is claimed by commit 6bf42bfe277cf6ca71fdcce2a89896849a36106a.
remaining_work: Wire AuthController + loopback listener + Carbonyl launch together in runtime/controller code.
Create or verify Ananta-local session storage integration.
Ensure generated Carbonyl success page never contains raw provider tokens.
Provide verified nonce/subject-hash handoff to realtime WebRTC.
implementation_tasks.title: Wire default Ananta-owned OIDC callback mode

evidence: Commit 6bf42bfe277cf6ca71fdcce2a89896849a36106a claims scripts/operator_tui_carbonyl_oidc_smoke.py and auth test suite.
remaining_work: Record concrete test/smoke command output for mock mode.
Keep live Keycloak/Google smoke optional and disabled in default CI.
implementation_tasks.title: Add Keycloak and Google compatibility smoke tests

evidence: Commit 6bf42bfe277cf6ca71fdcce2a89896849a36106a claims auth/oidc_audit.py with redacted audit event ring buffer.
remaining_work: Verify audit tests fail on token-like/cookie-like values.
Ensure audit covers realtime session nonce issuance without leaking the nonce itself.
implementation_tasks.title: Add redacted audit events for OIDC browser sessions

mermaid_architecture:
flowchart TD
    A[Operator TUI command] --> B{OIDC mode}
    B -->|real browser session| C[Carbonyl with isolated profile]
    C --> D[Provider login page]
    D --> E[Provider cookies/session stay in Carbonyl profile]
    B -->|Ananta-owned callback| F[AuthController creates state nonce PKCE]
    F --> G[Loopback callback 127.0.0.1 random port]
    F --> H[Carbonyl opens authorization URL]
    H --> I[Provider redirects to loopback]
    I --> J[Validate state nonce and exchange code]
    J --> K[Ananta session store owns tokens]
    K --> L[Carbonyl loads local authenticated Ananta page]
    K --> M[Derived subject hash + session nonce]
    M --> N[Realtime WebRTC stack]
    O[Legacy Hub relay] -. not used for OIDC token ownership .- K
acceptance_summary: OIDC core primitives are partially implemented.
Carbonyl real browser session mode is blocked until OIDC-specific BrowserModeController wiring exists.
Ananta-owned callback mode is in progress and needs runtime integration evidence.
Raw tokens/cookies must never be logged or passed to WebRTC signaling/DataChannel.
Each implementation task is marked done only after concrete code and verification evidence is present.
